text: RT @terminaldotshop: Moltbook guys in a month on Meta's roof https://t.co/9BRXdyn8w0

OpenAI bought OpenClaw
Facebook bought MoltBook

Sensing a pattern I am creating several new startups:

Antropic: AI Agents for Ants
GooGil: AI Agents for Fish
DeepSikh: AI Agents for Punjabis

All acquisition offers can be sent directly to my email

Most AI startups were built for a version of enterprise that doesn't exist

The real enterprise runs on NetSuite where the migration took 5 years, no one documents workflows, and procurement cycles alone outlast most startups' runway

We learned this by being in the room, and

There should be a legal requirement to label all text written by dumb people. I don’t want to spend the rest of my life parsing real communication from idiotic human slop. This is a mental tax I never agreed to or signed up for.

The story isn't "AI broke Amazon…

Macbook Neo 的槽点：
1. 电池相比 Air 砍了三分之一左右
2. 触控板竟然是物理按键的，不是振动马达
3. 屏幕和 Air 一样，但色域被莫名砍到了 sRGB
4. 两个 USB，其中一个是 USB 2.0
5. 不支持快充，充满一次需要 2.5 小时
6. A18 Pro 芯片相比 iPhone 少了一个 GPU 核心
7. 256 版本还砍掉了指纹解锁
